mapper.sql: oas.*, ot.id AS ot_id, ot.employee_id, ot.overtime_date, ot.start_time, ot.end_time, ot.hours, ot.reason, ot.status AS request_status, ot.created_at AS request_created_at, e.name AS employee_name, e.department_id, d.name AS department_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM overtime_approval_steps oas JOIN overtime_requests ot ON oas.overtime_request_id = ot.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ot.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE oas.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM overtime_approval_steps oas JOIN overtime_requests ot ON oas.overtime_request_id = ot.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ot.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE oas.overtime_request_id = #{overtimeRequestId} AND oas.status = 'WAITING' AND oas.step_order > #{stepOrder} ORDER BY oas.step_order LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM overtime_approval_steps oas JOIN overtime_requests ot ON oas.overtime_request_id = ot.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ot.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE oas.overtime_request_id = #{overtimeRequestId} ORDER BY oas.step_order

SELECT FROM overtime_approval_steps oas JOIN overtime_requests ot ON oas.overtime_request_id = ot.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ot.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE oas.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY oas.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE overtime_approval_steps SET status = 'APPROVED', approver_user_id = #{userId}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE overtime_approval_steps SET status = 'REJECTED', approver_user_id = #{userId}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE overtime_approval_steps SET status = 'PENDING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
